commit_scope: Add a minimal Windows bootstrap host executable source that loads swappable Form-emitted PE/COFF recipe DLLs, proving a replaceable exe surface with kernel parts behind dynamic-library boundaries.
evidence_refs: form/native/windows/bootstrap/form_bootstrap_host.c -> minimal C host exe source: LoadLibraryA, GetProcAddress, call i64->i64, print result

Git Bash with Windows toolchain PATH: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/windows-bootstrap-host.fk form-stdlib/tests/windows-bootstrap-host-band.fk -> core.fk+windows-bootstrap-host.fk+windows-bootstrap-host-band.fk -> 255; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent

Git Bash with Windows toolchain PATH: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-targets.fk form-stdlib/tests/hati-os-targets-band.fk -> core.fk+hati-os-targets.fk+hati-os-targets-band.fk -> 8388607; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent
Git Bash with Windows toolchain PATH: cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh windows-bootstrap-host hati-os-targets -> PASS-4WAY windows-bootstrap-host and PASS-4WAY hati-os-targets

cd form/form-kernel-go && go test . -run "TestWindowsBootstrapHostExeLoadsAndSwapsFormDLLs|TestWindowsRecipeDLLLoadsCallsAndSwaps|TestWindowsDylibCallRefusesMissing" -v -> Windows host exe compiles, two Form-emitted PE/COFF recipe DLLs link, and the exe loads/swaps both behind recipe
Subagent Tesla final read-only verification -> PASS: git diff --check, focused Form validates, fourth-arm gate, and Windows bootstrap exe/DLL swap Go tests

ci_validation.notes: PR CI has not run yet for this branch.

deploy_validation.notes: This change adds a local Windows native bootstrap floor. Public deployment validation remains pending until PR checks and post-merge deploy flow.

phase_gate.reason: Local and sub-agent validation passed; CI and deploy validation remain pending until commit, push, PR checks, and merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Windows x86_64 now has a minimal compiled host exe that can load a Form-emitted recipe DLL, call the recipe entrypoint, and swap DLL implementations without relinking the exe.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form stdlib, Windows bootstrap C source, and Go native loader tests; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Form four-way proof: windows-bootstrap-host band validates to 255 on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu with 0 divergent.
Target catalog proof: hati-os-targets validates to 8388607 with Windows x64 executable floor promoted to form-pe-coff+dll-bootstrap-exe.

Runtime proof: Go test compiles form_bootstrap_host.c into form-bootstrap-host.exe, emits two Form PE/COFF objects, links two DLLs with lld-link /dll /noentry /machine:x64 /export:recipe, and confirms the exe swaps both DLLs behind the same exported recipe symbol.
